mapper.select: SELECT m.ID, m.EQUIP_ID, m.FAULT_FIND_TIME, m.EMERGENCY_LEVEL, m.MAINT_TYPE_CODE, m.MAINT_TYPE_NAME, m.IS_STOPPED, m.FAULT_DESC, m.REPORT_TYPE_CODE, m.REPORT_TYPE_NAME, m.DISPATCH_TYPE_CODE, m.DISPATCH_TYPE_NAME, m.MAINT_ORG_ID, m.MAINT_ORG_NAME, m.MAINT_LEADER_ID, m.MAINT_LEADER_NAME, m.MAINT_LEADER_MOBILE, m.IS_SPECIAL_JOB, m.SPECIAL_JOB_CODE, m.SPECIAL_JOB_NAME, m.DISPATCHER_ID, m.DISPATCHER_NAME, m.DISPATCH_TIME, m.MAINT_START_TIME, m.MAINT_END_TIME, m.MAINT_REMARK, m.ACCEPTER_ID, m.ACCEPTER_NAME, m.ACCEPTANCE_TIME, m.ACCEPTANCE_REMARK, m.STATUS, m.WORK_ORDER_NO, m.CANCEL_BY, m.CANCEL_BY_NAME, m.CANCEL_TIME, m.CANCEL_REMARK, m.MANT_APP_NUMBER, m.CREATE_BY, m.CREATE_BY_NAME, m.CREATE_TIME, m.UPDATE_BY, m.UPDATE_BY_NAME, m.UPDATE_TIME, m.DEL_FLAG, m.DELETE_BY, m.DELETE_BY_NAME, m.DELETE_TIME, m.WORK_ORDER_NO, e.EQUIP_NAME, e.EQUIP_CODE, e.EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_ID, e.EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_NAME, -- 维修时长（小时）：维修结束时间 - 维修开始时间 CASE WHEN m.MAINT_START_TIME IS NOT NULL AND m.MAINT_END_TIME IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND((m.MAINT_END_TIME - m.MAINT_START_TIME) * 24, 2) ELSE NULL END AS MAINT_DURATION, -- 故障时长（小时）：优先取维修结束时间，否则取当前时间 CASE WHEN m.FAULT_FIND_TIME IS NOT NULL AND m.MAINT_END_TIME IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND((m.MAINT_END_TIME - m.FAULT_FIND_TIME) * 24, 2) WHEN m.FAULT_FIND_TIME IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND((SYSDATE - m.FAULT_FIND_TIME) * 24, 2) ELSE NULL END AS FAULT_DURATION FROM E_MAINT_INFO m LEFT JOIN E_M_EQPT_INFO e ON m.EQUIP_ID = e.ID AND e.DEL_FLAG = 0 WHERE m.ID = #{id} AND m.DEL_FLAG = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_MAINT_INFO ( ID, EQUIP_ID, FAULT_FIND_TIME, EMERGENCY_LEVEL, MAINT_TYPE_CODE, MAINT_TYPE_NAME, IS_STOPPED, FAULT_DESC, REPORT_TYPE_CODE, REPORT_TYPE_NAME, DISPATCH_TYPE_CODE, DISPATCH_TYPE_NAME, MAINT_ORG_ID, MAINT_ORG_NAME, MAINT_LEADER_ID, MAINT_LEADER_NAME, MAINT_LEADER_MOBILE, IS_SPECIAL_JOB, SPECIAL_JOB_CODE, SPECIAL_JOB_NAME, DISPATCHER_ID, DISPATCHER_NAME, DISPATCH_TIME, MAINT_START_TIME, MAINT_END_TIME, MAINT_REMARK, ACCEPTER_ID, ACCEPTER_NAME, ACCEPTANCE_TIME, ACCEPTANCE_REMARK, STATUS, WORK_ORDER_NO, CANCEL_REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, DEL_FLAG, SOURCE, SOURCE_ID, SOURCE_ITEM_ID, MANT_APP_NUMBER ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{equipId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{faultFindTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{emergencyLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{maintTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{maintTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isStopped,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{faultDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reportTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reportTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dispatchTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dispatchTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{maintOrgId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{maintOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{maintLeaderId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{maintLeaderName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{maintLeaderMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isSpecialJob,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specialJobCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specialJobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dispatcherId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{dispatcherName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dispatchTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{maintStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{maintEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{maintRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{accepterId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{accepterName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acceptanceTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{acceptanceRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{workOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cancelRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, 0, #{source}, #{sourceId}, #{sourceItemId}, #{mantAppNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_MAINT_INFO
EQUIP_ID = #{equipId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
FAULT_FIND_TIME = #{faultFindTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
EMERGENCY_LEVEL = #{emergencyLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MAINT_TYPE_CODE = #{maintTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MAINT_TYPE_NAME = #{maintTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_STOPPED = #{isStopped,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
FAULT_DESC = #{faultDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REPORT_TYPE_CODE = #{reportTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REPORT_TYPE_NAME = #{reportTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DISPATCH_TYPE_CODE = #{dispatchTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DISPATCH_TYPE_NAME = #{dispatchTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MAINT_ORG_ID = #{maintOrgId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
MAINT_ORG_NAME = #{maintOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MAINT_LEADER_ID = #{maintLeaderId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
MAINT_LEADER_NAME = #{maintLeaderName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MAINT_LEADER_MOBILE = #{maintLeaderMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_SPECIAL_JOB = #{isSpecialJob,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SPECIAL_JOB_CODE = #{specialJobCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SPECIAL_JOB_NAME = #{specialJobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DISPATCHER_ID = #{dispatcherId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
DISPATCHER_NAME = #{dispatcherName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DISPATCH_TIME = #{dispatchTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
MAINT_START_TIME = #{maintStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
MAINT_END_TIME = #{maintEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ACCEPTER_ID = #{accepterId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
ACCEPTER_NAME = #{accepterName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ACCEPTANCE_TIME = #{acceptanceTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ACCEPTANCE_REMARK = #{acceptanceRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MAINT_REMARK = #{maintRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CANCEL_REMARK = #{cancelRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MANT_APP_NUMBER = #{mantAppNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
WHERE ID = #{id}

UPDATE E_MAINT_INFO SET STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, MAINT_END_TIME = #{maintEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, MAINT_REMARK = #{maintRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ACCEPTANCE_TIME = NULL, ACCEPTANCE_REMARK = NULL, ACCEPTER_ID = NULL, ACCEPTER_NAME = NULL, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE E_MAINT_INFO SET DEL_FLAG = 1, DELETE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, DELETE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DELETE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT MAINTENANCE_UNIT_ID, MAINTENANCE_UNIT_NAME FROM E_IC_MAINT_PROJ_APPLY WHERE APP_NUMBER = #{appNumber}
